items.title: Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce Wedding Is Happening at New York’s Madison Square Garden, Law Enforcement Official Says

items.title: Dying 4 (Blue Bendy’s Joseph Nash) Announces Debut EP Perish Songs: Hear “Strafe”
items.summary: Joseph Nash plays guitar in the London art-rock band Blue Bendy, but he also heads up a project called Dying 4, mixing together woozy, art-damaged emo with UK dance genres like garage and bassline. They'll drop their debut EP Perish Songs two months from now.

items.title: Winter – “hollow (mixtape version)”
items.summary: You've heard of "Summer Babe (Winter Version)." Now let me introduce you to Winter, singing about summer, on "hollow (mixtape version)." The post Winter – “hollow (mixtape version)” appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Angela Autumn Announces New Album Believer: Hear “Mountain Stream”
items.summary: Since releasing her full-length debut Frontiers Woman in 2021, Angela Autumn has been opening for acts like Bonny Light Horseman and Cut Worms, and her great 2023 track "Electric Lizard" took off. Now, the Appalachian-born and Nashville-based musician is announcing her second album, Believer, which arrives this fall. "Mountain Stream" is out alongside the news.
